title: Dynamics for a viscoelastic beam equation with past history and nonlocal boundary dissipation
summary: This article aims to study the long-time dynamics of the linear viscoelastic plate equation $\displaystyle{u_{tt}+Δ^2 u-\int_τ^tg(t-s)Δ^2u(s)ds=0}$ subject to nonlinear and nonlocal boundary conditions. This model, with $τ=0$, was first considered by Cavalcanti (Discrete Contin. Dyn. Syst., 8(3), 675-695, 2002), where results of global existence and uniform decay rates of energy have been established. In this work, by taking $τ=-\infty$, and considering the autonomous equivalent problem we prove that the dynamical system $(\mathcal{H},S_t)$ generated by the weak solutions has a compact global attractor $\mathfrak{A}$ (in the topology of the weak phase space $\mathcal{H}$), which in subcritical case has finite dimension and smoothness. Furthermore, when the force follows the {\it Hook Law}, we prove that $(\mathcal{H},S_t)$ possesses a (generalized) fractal exponential attractor $\mathfrak{A}_{\exp}$ with finite dimension in a space $\widetilde{\mathcal{H}}\supset\mathcal{H}$.

AI.tldr: 研究具有非线性非局部边界条件的线性粘弹性板方程长时动力学，证明弱解生成动力系统存在紧全局吸引子，并在亚临界情形下具有有限维性和光滑性。
AI.motivation: 研究Cavalcanti(2002)提出的粘弹性板方程在非线性非局部边界条件下的长时行为，将原模型中的τ=0推广到τ=-∞，考虑自治等价问题，分析系统在无限时间尺度上的动力学特性。
AI.techniques: 使用动力系统理论、吸引子理论、全局吸引子存在性证明技术、分数指数吸引子构造方法，以及弱相空间中的紧性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弱解生成的动力系统(ℋ,S_t)存在紧全局吸引子𝔄；2. 在亚临界情形下，吸引子具有有限维度和光滑性；3. 当力满足胡克定律时，系统存在具有有限维度的广义分形指数吸引子𝔄_exp。
AI.significance: 将粘弹性板方程的动力学分析从有限记忆推广到无限记忆情形，建立了非线性非局部边界条件下系统长时行为的完整理论框架，为粘弹性结构动力学研究提供了新的数学工具。

title: Plastic limit of a viscoplastic Burgers equation -- A toy model for sea-ice dynamics
summary: We study the plastic Burgers equation in one space dimension, i.e., the Burgers equation featuring an additional term formally given by the p-Laplacian with p=1, or rather, by the multivalued subdifferential of the total variation functional. Our study highlights that the interplay of the advection term with the stresses given by the multivalued 1-Laplacian is a crucial feature of this model. Eventhough it is an interesting model in itsef, it can also be regarded as a one-dimensional version of the momentum balance of Hibler's model for sea-ice dynamics. Therein, the stress tensor is given by a term with similar properties as the 1-Laplacian in order to account for plastic effects of the ice. For our analysis we start out from a viscoplastic Burgers equation, i.e., a suitably regularized version of the plastic Burgers equation with a small regularization parameter $\varepsilon>0$. For the viscoplastic Burgers equation, we construct a global BV-solution. In the singular limit $\varepsilon\to0$ we deduce the existence of a BV-solution for the plastic Burgers equation. In addition we show that the term arising as the limit of the regularized stresses is indeed related to an element of the subdifferential of the total variation functional.

AI.tldr: 证明了塑性Burgers方程BV解的存在性，通过粘塑性正则化方法构造解并处理1-Laplacian的多值性
AI.motivation: 研究一维塑性Burgers方程，该方程包含1-Laplacian项（总变差泛函的多值次微分），既是自身有趣的数学模型，也可视为Hibler海冰动力学模型中动量平衡的一维版本，用于描述冰的塑性效应
AI.techniques: 采用粘塑性正则化方法，通过小参数ε>0正则化塑性Burgers方程，构造全局BV解，然后在奇异极限ε→0中推导塑性方程解的存在性，并证明极限应力项与总变差泛函次微分元素相关
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对粘塑性Burgers方程构造了全局BV解；2. 在奇异极限ε→0下证明了塑性Burgers方程BV解的存在性；3. 证明了极限应力项确实是总变差泛函次微分中的元素
AI.significance: 为处理具有多值1-Laplacian项的偏微分方程提供了新的分析方法，建立了粘塑性正则化与奇异极限之间的联系，对理解Hibler海冰模型等具有塑性效应的物理系统有重要理论意义

title: Minimality of free-boundary axial hyperplanes in high dimensional circular cones via calibration
summary: Consider an $(n+1)$-dimensional circular cone. Using a calibration argument, we prove that if $n \geq 4$ and the aperture of the cone is sufficiently large, the intersection of the cone with an axial hyperplane is area-minimizing with respect to free-boundary variations inside the cone.

AI.tldr: 证明了当维度n≥4且锥体孔径足够大时，锥体与轴向超平面的交面在锥体内部关于自由边界变分是面积极小的
AI.motivation: 研究高维锥体中超平面截面的极小曲面性质，特别是自由边界条件下的面积极小性问题
AI.techniques: 使用校准(calibration)论证方法，这是几何测度论中证明极小性的经典技术
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：当n≥4且锥体孔径足够大时，锥体与轴向超平面的交面在锥体内部关于自由边界变分是面积极小的
AI.significance: 为高维锥体中的极小曲面理论提供了新的结果，扩展了校准方法在自由边界问题中的应用

title: Global Well-Posedness of the Vacuum Free Boundary Problem for the Degenerate Compressible Navier-Stokes Equations With Large Data of Spherical Symmetry
summary: The study of global-in-time dynamics of vacuum is crucial for understanding viscous flows. However, the corresponding large-data problems for multidimensional spherically symmetric flows have remained open, due to the coordinate singularity at the origin and the strong degeneracy on the moving boundary. In this paper, we analyze the vacuum free boundary problem for the barotropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate density-dependent viscosity coefficients (as in the shallow water equations) in two and three spatial dimensions. We prove that, for a general class of spherically symmetric initial density: $ρ_0^β\in H^3$ with $β\in (\frac{1}{3},γ-1]$ ($γ$: adiabatic exponent) vanishing on the moving boundary in the form of a distance function, no vacuum forms inside the fluid in finite time, and we establish the global well-posedness of classical solutions with large initial data. Particularly, when $β=γ-1$, the initial density contains a physical vacuum, but fails to satisfy the condition required for the Bresch-Desjardins (BD) entropy estimate when $γ\ge 2$. Our analysis is mainly based on a region-segmentation method: near the origin, we develop an interior BD entropy estimate, thereby obtaining flow-map-weighted estimates for the density; while, near the boundary, we construct $ρ_0$-weighted estimates for the effective velocity, which differ fundamentally from the classical BD entropy estimates and yield novel flow-map-weighted estimates for both the fluid and the effective velocities. These estimates enable us to obtain the uniform upper bound for the density and show that no cavitation occurs inside the fluid. The methodology developed here should also be useful for solving other related nonlinear equations involving similar difficulties.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有退化密度依赖粘性系数的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程真空自由边界问题的大初值全局经典解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究真空自由边界问题对于理解粘性流动至关重要，但多维球对称流动的大初值问题由于坐标奇点和移动边界上的强退化性一直未解决
AI.techniques: 区域分割法：在原点附近发展内部BD熵估计得到密度流图加权估计；在边界附近构造ρ₀加权有效速度估计，不同于经典BD熵估计
AI.main_theorems: 对于一类球对称初始密度ρ₀^β∈H³（β∈(1/3,γ-1]），真空在有限时间内不会在流体内部形成，建立了大初值经典解的全局适定性
AI.significance: 解决了多维球对称流动大初值问题的开放性问题，发展了处理坐标奇点和移动边界退化的新方法，对相关非线性方程有应用价值

title: Necessary and sufficient condition for existence at resonance for eigenvalues of multiplicity two
summary: We establish necessary and sufficient condition for existence of solutions for a class of semilinear Dirichlet problems with the linear part at resonance at eigenvalues of multiplicity two. The result is applied to give a condition for unboundness of all solutions of the corresponding semilinear heat equation.

AI.tldr: 建立了共振特征值重数为二的半线性Dirichlet问题解存在的充要条件，并应用于相应半线性热方程所有解的无界性分析
AI.motivation: 研究线性部分在重数为二的特征值处共振的半线性Dirichlet问题解的存在性，这类问题在共振情况下通常具有非平凡的解结构
AI.techniques: 共振理论、变分方法、Lyapunov-Schmidt约化、谱分析、非线性泛函分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了重数为二的特征值共振时半线性Dirichlet问题解存在的充要条件，并将该结果应用于证明相应半线性热方程所有解的无界性
AI.significance: 扩展了共振问题的理论框架，为多重特征值共振问题提供了完整的解存在性判据，并在抛物型偏微分方程解的长时间行为研究中具有重要应用

title: Extinction and persistence criteria in non-local Klausmeier model of vegetation dynamics on flat landscapes
summary: This paper investigates the dynamics of vegetation patterns in water-limited ecosystems using a generalized Klausmeier model that incorporates non-local plant dispersal within a finite habitat. We establish the well-posedness of the system and provide a rigorous analysis of the conditions required for vegetation survival. Our results identify a critical patch size governed by the trade-off between local growth and boundary losses; habitats smaller than this threshold lead to inevitable extinction. Furthermore, we derive a critical maximal biomass density below which the population collapses to a desert state, regardless of the domain size. We determine stability criteria for stationary solutions and describe the emergence of stable, non-trivial biomass distributions. Numerical experiments comparing sub-Gaussian and super-Gaussian kernels confirm that non-local dispersal mechanisms, particularly those with fat tails, enhance ecosystem resilience by allowing vegetation to persist in smaller, fragmented habitats than predicted by classical local diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有非局部扩散的广义Klausmeier模型的适定性，确定了植被生存的临界斑块大小和临界最大生物量密度
AI.motivation: 研究水资源受限生态系统中植被斑块动力学，考虑非局部植物扩散和有限栖息地，旨在理解植被生存条件和生态系统韧性
AI.techniques: 使用广义Klausmeier模型，结合非局部扩散算子；建立系统适定性；分析临界斑块大小和临界生物量密度；稳定性分析；数值实验比较亚高斯和超高斯核
AI.main_theorems: 1) 系统适定性；2) 植被生存的临界斑块大小由局部增长与边界损失的权衡决定；3) 临界最大生物量密度决定种群是否崩溃为荒漠状态；4) 稳态解的稳定性判据；5) 非局部扩散（特别是厚尾核）增强生态系统韧性
AI.significance: 为理解水资源受限生态系统中植被斑块形成和维持提供了严格数学框架，揭示了非局部扩散对生态系统韧性的增强作用，对生态保护和恢复有重要指导意义

title: Homogenization of Lévy-type operators: operator estimates with correctors
summary:
The goal of the paper is to study in $L_2(\R^d)$ a self-adjoint operator ${\mathbb A}_\eps$, $\eps >0$, of the form $$ ({\mathbb A}_\eps u) (\x) = \int_{\R^d} μ(\x/\eps, \y/\eps) \frac{\left( u(\x) - u(\y) \right)}{|\x - \y|^{d+α}}\,d\y $$ with $1< α< 2$;
  here the function
  $μ(\x,\y)$ is $\Z^d$-periodic in the both variables, satisfies the symmetry relation $μ(\x,\y) = μ(\y,\x)$ and
  the estimates $0< μ_- \leqslant μ(\x,\y) \leqslant μ_+< \infty$. The rigorous definition of the operator ${\mathbb A}_\eps$ is given in terms of the corresponding quadratic form. In the previous work of the authors it was shown that the resolvent $({\mathbb A}_\eps + I)^{-1}$ converges, as $\eps\to0$, in the operator norm in $L_2(\mathbb R^d)$ to the resolvent of the effective operator $A^0$, and the estimate $\|({\mathbb A}_\eps + I)^{-1} - (\A^0 + I)^{-1} \| = O(\eps^{2-α})$ holds. In the present work we achieve a more accurate approximation of the resolvent of ${\mathbb A}_\eps$ which takes into account the correctors. Namely, for $N\in\mathbb N$ such that $2-1/N < α\le 2-1/(N+1)$, we obtain $$ \bigl\|({\mathbb A}_\eps + I)^{-1} - (\A^0 + I)^{-1} - \sum_{m=1}^N \eps^{m(2-α)} \mathbb{K}_m \bigr\| = O(\eps). $$

AI.tldr: 该论文为具有周期系数的非局部算子建立了高阶校正子展开，将近似精度从O(ε^{2-α})提升到O(ε)
AI.motivation: 研究具有周期系数的非局部算子的均匀化问题，特别是当指数α∈(1,2)时，先前工作只得到O(ε^{2-α})的收敛速度，本文旨在通过引入校正子获得更精确的近似
AI.techniques: 使用二次形式定义算子、均匀化理论、校正子展开方法、算子范数估计、谱分析技术
AI.significance: 为非局部算子的均匀化理论提供了更精细的收敛结果，将近似精度提升到最优阶，对分数阶拉普拉斯算子的均匀化研究有重要理论意义

title: Global regularity and sharp decay to the 2D Hypo-Viscous compressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: In this paper, we consider the global regularity and the optimal time decay rate for the 2D isentropic hypo-viscous compressible Navier-Stokes equations. Firstly, we prove that there exists a global strong solution with the small initial data are close to the constant equilibrium state in $H^s$ framework with $s>1$. Furthermore, by virtue of improved Fourier splitting method and the Littlewood-Paley decomposition theory, we then establish the optimal time decay rate for low regularity data.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维等熵次粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在小初值条件下的全局正则性和最优时间衰减率
AI.motivation: 研究二维等熵次粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局正则性和时间衰减行为，这类方程在流体力学中具有重要应用，但正则性和衰减率问题尚未完全解决
AI.techniques: 改进的傅里叶分裂方法、Littlewood-Paley分解理论、H^s框架下的能量估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在小初值条件下存在全局强解；2. 建立了低正则性数据的最优时间衰减率
AI.significance: 为次粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，建立了最优衰减率结果，对理解这类方程的长时间行为有重要意义

title: Existence results for a non-relativistic Chern-Simons model with purely mutual interaction
summary: We are concerned with a skew-symmetric singular Liouville system arising in non-relativistic Chern-Simons theory. Based on its variational structure, we establish existence and multiplicity results. Since the energy functional is indefinite, standard variational approaches do not apply directly. We overcome this difficulty by introducing a suitable constrained problem and implementing a Morse-theoretical argument

AI.tldr: 通过变分方法和Morse理论，建立了非相对论Chern-Simons理论中斜对称奇异Liouville系统的存在性和多重性结果
AI.motivation: 研究非相对论Chern-Simons理论中出现的斜对称奇异Liouville系统，该系统具有变分结构但能量泛函是不定的，标准变分方法无法直接应用
AI.techniques: 引入合适的约束问题，运用Morse理论论证，处理不定能量泛函的变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了该奇异Liouville系统的存在性和多重性结果，克服了能量泛函不定的困难
AI.significance: 为非相对论Chern-Simons理论中的数学问题提供了严格的解的存在性理论，发展了处理不定泛函的变分方法，对相关物理模型有重要应用价值

title: Asymptotic formulas for phase recovering from phaseless data of biharmonic waves at a fixed frequency
summary: This paper focuses on phase retrieval from phaseless total-field data in biharmonic scattering problems. We prove that a phased biharmonic wave can be uniquely determined by the modulus of the total biharmonic wave within a nonempty domain. As a direct corollary, the uniqueness for the inverse biharmonic scattering problem with phaseless total-field data is established. Moreover, using the Atkinson-type asymptotic expansion, we derive explicit asymptotic formulas for the problem of phase retrieval.

AI.tldr: 证明了双调和散射问题中仅使用无相位总场数据即可唯一确定相位信息
AI.motivation: 研究双调和散射问题中的相位恢复问题，特别是在仅能测量总场幅度（无相位信息）的情况下，能否唯一确定散射场的相位信息
AI.techniques: 使用Atkinson型渐近展开方法，推导相位恢复问题的显式渐近公式
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了在非空区域内，通过双调和波的总场模值可以唯一确定其相位；2. 作为直接推论，建立了无相位总场数据下逆双调和散射问题的唯一性
AI.significance: 为双调和散射中的相位恢复问题提供了理论基础，扩展了逆散射理论，对实际应用中的无相位测量问题具有重要意义

title: Lebesgue points of measures and non tangential convergence of Poisson-Hermite integrals
comment: 16 pages. Published in Jour Evol Eq
summary: We study differentiability conditions on a complex measure $ν$ at a point $x_0\in\mathbb{R}^d$, in relation with the boundary convergence at that point of the Poisson-type integral $P_tν=e^{-t\sqrt L}ν$, where $L=-Δ+|x|^2$ is the Hermite operator. In particular, we show that $x_0$ is a Lebesgue point for $ν$ iff a slightly stronger notion than non-tangential convergence holds for $P_tν$ at $x_0$. We also show non-tangential convergence when $x_0$ is a $σ$-point of $ν$, a weaker notion than Lebesgue point, which for $d=1$ coincides with the classical Fatou condition.

AI.tldr: 建立了复测度在Hermite算子泊松型积分边界收敛与Lebesgue点、σ点之间的等价关系
AI.motivation: 研究复测度在Hermite算子L=-Δ+|x|^2下的泊松型积分P_tν=e^{-t√L}ν在边界点x₀的收敛性，探讨不同可微性条件（Lebesgue点、σ点）与边界收敛的关系
AI.techniques: 使用Hermite算子理论、泊松型积分、非切向收敛分析、复测度理论、Lebesgue点与σ点概念
AI.main_theorems: 1. x₀是ν的Lebesgue点当且仅当P_tν在x₀满足比非切向收敛稍强的收敛性；2. 当x₀是ν的σ点时（弱于Lebesgue点），P_tν在x₀非切向收敛；3. 在一维情形下，σ点条件等价于经典的Fatou条件
AI.significance: 将经典调和分析中的Fatou定理推广到Hermite算子框架，建立了测度可微性条件与算子半群边界收敛的精确对应关系，发展了非欧几里得空间中的边界值理论

title: An Inverse Almost Periodic Problem for a Semilinear Strongly Damped Wave Equation
summary: The paper investigates an inverse boundary value problem for a semilinear strongly damped wave equation with the Dirichlet boundary condition in Sobolev spaces of bounded (in particular, almost periodic and periodic) functions. In addition to finding a weak solution, we also determine a source coefficient in the right-hand side of the differential equation. To make the problem well-posed, an integral-type overdetermination condition is imposed. After reducing the inverse problem to a direct one, we solve the latter in several steps. First, we prove the existence and uniqueness of a weak solution to the corresponding initial-boundary value problem on a finite time interval. Next, we show that this solution can be extended in a bounded way to the semiaxis $t\ge 0$. In the following step, we further extend this bounded solution to all $t\in R$. Finally, we establish that if the data of the original problem are almost periodic (or periodic), then the resulting bounded weak solution is itself almost periodic (or periodic).

AI.tldr: 研究强阻尼半线性波动方程在Sobolev空间中的反边值问题，同时确定弱解和源系数
AI.motivation: 研究有界函数（特别是概周期和周期函数）Sobolev空间中带Dirichlet边界条件的强阻尼半线性波动方程的反边值问题。除了寻找弱解外，还需要确定微分方程右侧的源系数。为使问题适定，施加了积分型超定条件。
AI.techniques: 将反问题转化为正问题，分步求解：首先在有限时间区间上证明初边值问题弱解的存在唯一性；然后将解有界延拓到半轴t≥0；再进一步延拓到所有t∈R；最后证明如果原始数据是概周期（或周期）的，则所得有界弱解也是概周期（或周期）的。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 有限时间区间上初边值问题弱解的存在唯一性定理；2. 解的有界延拓定理（到半轴和全实轴）；3. 解的概周期性/周期性保持定理：如果数据是概周期（或周期）的，则解也是概周期（或周期）的。
AI.significance: 该研究扩展了强阻尼波动方程反问题的理论框架，为处理有界函数空间中的反问题提供了系统方法，特别在概周期和周期函数空间中的结果具有理论意义，可能应用于物理和工程中的参数识别问题。

title: Local and global $C^{1,β}$-regularity for uniformly elliptic quasilinear equations of $p$-Laplace and Orlicz-Laplace type
summary: We establish gradient Hölder continuity for solutions to quasilinear, uniformly elliptic equations, including $p$-Laplace and Orlicz-Laplace type operators. We revisit and improve upon the results existing in the literature, proving gradient regularity both in the interior and up to the boundary, under Dirichlet or Neumann boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 建立了拟线性一致椭圆方程（包括p-Laplace和Orlicz-Laplace型算子）解的梯度Hölder连续性
AI.motivation: 研究拟线性椭圆方程（特别是p-Laplace和Orlicz-Laplace型算子）的梯度正则性问题，这类方程在变分法、几何分析和物理建模中有广泛应用，其梯度正则性是理解解行为的关键
AI.techniques: 使用椭圆正则性理论、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser型估计、Campanato空间方法，以及处理非线性算子的变分技术，特别是针对p-Laplace和Orlicz-Laplace算子的特殊结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了拟线性一致椭圆方程解的梯度Hölder连续性，改进了文献中的现有结果，同时建立了内部和边界（在Dirichlet或Neumann边界条件下）的梯度正则性
AI.significance: 为p-Laplace和Orlicz-Laplace型方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，这些结果在变分问题、自由边界问题、几何偏微分方程和材料科学中有重要应用

title: Uniform bounds for Neumann heat kernels and their traces in convex sets
comment: The paper extends part of what was contained in an earlier version of arXiv:2407.11808
summary: We prove a bound on the heat trace of the Neumann Laplacian on a convex domain that captures the first two terms in its small-time expansion, but is valid for all times and depends on the underlying domain only through very simple geometric characteristics. This is proved via a precise and uniform expansion of the on-diagonal heat kernel close to the boundary. Most of our results are valid without the convexity assumption and we also consider two-term asymptotics for the heat trace for Lipschitz domains.

AI.tldr: 证明了凸区域上Neumann拉普拉斯算子热迹的全局有效边界，捕捉了小时间展开的前两项，仅依赖于简单的几何特征。
AI.motivation: 研究凸区域上Neumann拉普拉斯算子的热迹行为，特别是小时间展开的前两项，但希望得到全局有效且仅依赖于简单几何特征的边界估计。
AI.techniques: 通过精确且一致的对角线热核在边界附近的展开，结合凸性假设（部分结果无需凸性），考虑Lipschitz域的热迹两阶渐近分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 凸区域上Neumann拉普拉斯算子热迹的全局有效边界，捕捉小时间展开前两项；2. 对角线热核在边界附近的一致展开；3. Lipschitz域的热迹两阶渐近结果。
AI.significance: 提供了热迹的全局有效估计，仅依赖于简单几何特征，扩展了经典小时间渐近理论，对谱几何和偏微分方程理论有重要意义。

title: Stationary internal waves in a two-dimensional aquarium at low viscosity
summary: We prove the uniform solvability of a stationary problem associated to internal waves equation with small viscosity in a two dimensional aquarium with real-analytic boundary, under a Morse--Smale dynamical assumption. This is achieved by using complex deformations of the aquarium, on which the inviscid stationary internal wave operator is invertible.

AI.tldr: 证明了在具有实解析边界的二维水族箱中，带有小粘性的内波方程稳态问题的一致可解性
AI.motivation: 研究带有小粘性的内波方程稳态解的存在性和唯一性问题，特别是在具有实解析边界的二维水族箱中，该问题在流体力学和地球物理流体动力学中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用水族箱的复形变技术，在复形变区域上证明无粘稳态内波算子的可逆性，结合Morse-Smale动力系统假设
AI.main_theorems: 在Morse-Smale动力假设下，证明了具有实解析边界的二维水族箱中，带有小粘性的内波方程稳态问题的一致可解性
AI.significance: 为粘性内波方程的稳态解理论提供了重要结果，将复分析方法应用于流体力学问题，对理解分层流体中的波传播现象有理论意义

title: Classification of single-bubble blow-up solutions for Calogero--Moser derivative nonlinear Schrödinger equation
summary:
We study the Calogero--Moser derivative nonlinear Schrödinger equation (CM-DNLS), a mass-critical and completely integrable dispersive model. Recent works established finite-time blow-up constructions and soliton resolution, describing the asymptotic behaviors of blow-up solutions.
  In this paper, we go beyond soliton resolution and provide a sharp classification of finite-time blow-up dynamics in the \textit{single-bubble} regime. Assuming that a solution blows up at time $0<T<\infty$ with a single-soliton profile, we determine all possible blow-up rates. For initial data in $H^{2L+1}(\mathbb{R})$ with $L\ge1$, we prove a dichotomy: either the solution lies in a \emph{quantized regime}, where the scaling parameter satisfies \[
  λ(t)\sim (T-t)^{2k},\qquad 1\le k\le L, \] with convergent phase and translation parameters, or it lies in an \emph{exotic regime}, where the blow-up rate satisfies $λ(t)\lesssim (T-t)^{2L+\frac 32}$. To our knowledge, this is the first classification result for quantized blow-up dynamics in the class of dispersive models. We provide a framework for identifying the quantized blow-up rates in classification problems.
  The proof relies on a modulation analysis combined with the hierarchy of conservation laws provided by the complete integrability of (CM-DNLS). However, it does not use \emph{more refined integrability-based techniques}, such as the inverse scattering method, the method of commuting flows, or the explicit formula. As a result, our analysis applies beyond the chiral solutions.

AI.tldr: 首次在色散模型中实现了有限时间爆破动力学的量化分类，揭示了单气泡区域中爆破速率的二重性结构
AI.motivation: 研究Calogero-Moser导数非线性薛定谔方程(CM-DNLS)的有限时间爆破动力学，该方程具有质量临界性和完全可积性。已有工作建立了有限时间爆破构造和孤立子分解，但需要超越孤立子分解，对爆破动力学进行更精细的分类
AI.techniques: 调制分析结合完全可积性提供的守恒律层次结构，不使用逆散射方法、交换流方法或显式公式等更精细的可积性技术
AI.main_theorems: 对于H^{2L+1}(R)中的初始数据(L≥1)，证明了爆破动力学的二重性：要么处于量化区域，其中标度参数满足λ(t)∼(T-t)^{2k}(1≤k≤L)，相位和平移参数收敛；要么处于奇异区域，其中爆破速率满足λ(t)≲(T-t)^{2L+3/2}
AI.significance: 首次在色散模型中获得量化爆破动力学的分类结果，为分类问题中识别量化爆破速率提供了框架，分析适用于更广泛的解类（超越手性解）

title: Critical points of solutions of elliptic equations in divergence form in planar non simply connected domains with smooth or nonsmooth boundary
summary:
We study the critical points of the solution of second elliptic equations in divergence and diagonal form with a bounded and positive definite coefficient, under the assumption that the statement of the Hopf lemma holds (sign assumptions on its normal derivatives) along the boundary. The proof combines the argument principle introduced in [1] for elliptic equations with the representation formula (using quasi-conformal mappings) for operators in divergence form in simply connected domains [2]. The case of a degenerate coefficient is also treated where we combine the level lines technique and the maximum principle with the argument principle. Finally, some numerical experiments on illustrative examples are presented.
  [1] G. Alessandrini and R. Magnanini. The index of isolated critical points and solutions of elliptic equations in the plane. Ann. Scuola Norm. Sup. Pisa Cl. Sci. (4), 19(4):567-589, 1992 [2] G. Alessandrini and R. Magnanini. Elliptic equations in divergence form, geometric critical points of solutions, and Stekloff eigenfunctions. SIAM J. Math. Anal., 25(5):1259-1268, 1994

AI.tldr: 研究椭圆方程解的临界点性质，结合Hopf引理、辐角原理和拟共形映射技术
AI.motivation: 研究二阶椭圆方程（散度形式和对角形式）解的临界点性质，假设边界上满足Hopf引理的条件（法向导数符号假设），旨在理解解的几何结构
AI.techniques: 结合Alessandrini和Magnanini引入的辐角原理、拟共形映射表示公式、水平线技术、最大值原理，以及退化系数情况的特殊处理
AI.main_theorems: 在单连通区域中，对于有界正定系数的椭圆方程，在Hopf引理成立的边界条件下，建立了解的临界点性质；同时处理了退化系数情况
AI.significance: 将辐角原理扩展到更一般的椭圆算子，为理解解的几何结构提供新工具，对Stekloff特征函数和椭圆方程解的临界点理论有重要贡献

title: Log-concavity of solutions of parabolic equations related to the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck operator and applications
summary: In this paper, we investigate the log-concavity of the kernel for the parabolic Ornstein-Uhlenbeck operator in a bounded, convex domain. Consequently, we get the preservation of the log-concavity of the initial datum by the related flow. As an application, we give another proof of a Brunn-Minkowski type inequality for the first eigenvalue of the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck operator and of the log-concavity of the related first eigenfunction (both results have been proved in [9], by different methods).

AI.tldr: 证明了有界凸区域上抛物型Ornstein-Uhlenbeck算子核的对数凹性，从而得到初始数据对数凹性在流演化下的保持
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型Ornstein-Uhlenbeck算子在有界凸区域上的性质，特别是其核函数的对数凹性，这关系到热流演化过程中凸性结构的保持问题
AI.techniques: 利用抛物型Ornstein-Uhlenbeck算子的性质，通过分析核函数的对数凹性，应用热流演化理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 有界凸区域上抛物型Ornstein-Uhlenbeck算子核的对数凹性定理；2. 初始数据对数凹性在相关流演化下的保持定理；3. Ornstein-Uhlenbeck算子第一特征值的Brunn-Minkowski型不等式新证明；4. 相关第一特征函数对数凹性的新证明
AI.significance: 为Ornstein-Uhlenbeck算子的凸性分析提供了新视角，建立了热流演化中凸性保持的理论框架，并给出了重要不等式和特征函数性质的新证明方法

title: Global renormalized solutions to Boltzmann systems modeling mixture gases of monatomic and polyatomic species
summary: Inspired by DiPerna-Lions' work \cite{Diperna-Lions}, we study the renormalized solutions to the large-data Cauchy problem of the Boltzmann systems modeling mixture gases of monatomic and polyatomic species, in which the distribution functions $f_α$ characterized the polyatomic species contain the continuous internal energy variable $I \in \mathbb{R}_+$. We first construct the smooth approximated problem and establish the corresponding uniform and physically natural bounds. Then, by employing the averaged velocity (-internal energy) lemma, we can show that the weak $L^1$ limit of the approximated solution is exactly a renormalized solution what we required. Moreover, we also justify that the constructed renormalized solution subjects to the entropy inequality.

AI.tldr: 建立了描述单原子与多原子混合气体Boltzmann系统大初值Cauchy问题的重整化解存在性理论
AI.motivation: 受DiPerna-Lions工作的启发，研究包含连续内能变量的多原子气体混合Boltzmann系统的大初值Cauchy问题，其中多原子物种的分布函数包含连续内能变量I∈ℝ₊
AI.techniques: 采用DiPerna-Lions重整化解方法，构造光滑逼近问题并建立一致物理边界，运用平均速度(-内能)引理证明弱L¹极限即为所需重整化解
AI.main_theorems: 证明了逼近解的弱L¹极限是满足熵不等式的重整化解，建立了混合气体Boltzmann系统大初值问题的重整化解存在性
AI.significance: 将DiPerna-Lions重整化解理论推广到包含连续内能变量的多原子混合气体系统，为复杂气体动力学模型提供了严格的数学基础

title: On a Sobolev critical problem for the superposition of a local and nonlocal operator with the "wrong sign''
summary: We study a critical problem for an operator of mixed order obtained by the superposition of a Laplacian with a fractional Laplacian. The main novelty is that we consider a mixed operator of the form $-Δ- γ(-Δ)^s$, namely we suppose that the fractional Laplacian has the ``wrong sign'' and can be seen as a nonlocal perturbation of the purely local case, which is needed to produce a nontrivial solution of the critical problem.

AI.tldr: 研究带"错误符号"的混合阶算子$-Δ- γ(-Δ)^s$的临界问题，其中分数阶拉普拉斯算子作为非局部扰动产生非平凡解
AI.motivation: 研究由拉普拉斯算子与分数阶拉普拉斯算子叠加而成的混合阶算子的临界问题。主要创新点在于考虑形式为$-Δ- γ(-Δ)^s$的混合算子，其中分数阶拉普拉斯算子带有"错误符号"，可以看作纯局部情况下的非局部扰动，这是产生临界问题非平凡解所必需的。
AI.techniques: 混合阶算子分析、分数阶拉普拉斯算子理论、临界点理论、变分方法、非局部扰动分析
AI.main_theorems: 关于混合算子$-Δ- γ(-Δ)^s$临界问题的存在性结果，其中分数阶拉普拉斯算子带有负系数，作为非局部扰动确保非平凡解的存在
AI.significance: 扩展了混合阶算子的临界问题理论，为带有"错误符号"非局部扰动的算子提供了新的分析框架，在非局部偏微分方程和变分问题中有重要应用

title: Backward Reconstruction of the Chafee--Infante Equation via Physics-Informed WGAN-GP
summary:
We present a physics-informed Wasserstein GAN with gradient penalty (WGAN-GP) for solving the inverse Chafee--Infante problem on two-dimensional domains with Dirichlet boundary conditions. The objective is to reconstruct an unknown initial condition from a near-equilibrium state obtained after 100 explicit forward Euler iterations of the reaction-diffusion equation \[ u_t - γΔu + κ\left(u^3 - u\right)=0. \] Because this mapping strongly damps high-frequency content, the inverse problem is severely ill-posed and sensitive to noise.
  Our approach integrates a U-Net generator, a PatchGAN critic with spectral normalization, Wasserstein loss with gradient penalty, and several physics-informed auxiliary terms, including Lyapunov energy matching, distributional statistics, and a crucial forward-simulation penalty. This penalty enforces consistency between the predicted initial condition and its forward evolution under the \emph{same} forward Euler discretization used for dataset generation. Earlier experiments employing an Eyre-type semi-implicit solver were not compatible with this residual mechanism due to the cost and instability of Newton iterations within batched GPU training.
  On a dataset of 50k training and 10k testing pairs on $128\times128$ grids (with natural $[-1,1]$ amplitude scaling), the best trained model attains a mean absolute error (MAE) of approximately \textbf{0.23988159} on the full test set, with a sample-wise standard deviation of about \textbf{0.00266345}. The results demonstrate stable inversion, accurate recovery of interfacial structure, and robustness to high-frequency noise in the initial data.

AI.tldr: 提出基于物理信息的Wasserstein GAN-GP方法，解决二维Chafee-Infante反应扩散方程的逆问题，从近平衡状态重构未知初始条件。
AI.motivation: Chafee-Infante反应扩散方程的逆问题具有严重不适定性，对高频噪声敏感，传统方法难以稳定求解。需要开发能够处理二维域上Dirichlet边界条件的鲁棒逆问题求解方法。
AI.techniques: 物理信息Wasserstein GAN-GP框架，结合U-Net生成器、谱归一化PatchGAN判别器、Wasserstein损失加梯度惩罚，以及Lyapunov能量匹配、分布统计和前向模拟惩罚等物理约束项。
AI.main_theorems: 在128×128网格上，使用50k训练和10k测试数据对，最佳模型在完整测试集上达到平均绝对误差约0.23988159，样本间标准差约0.00266345，实现了稳定的逆问题求解。
AI.significance: 为严重不适定的反应扩散方程逆问题提供了基于深度学习的鲁棒求解框架，能够准确恢复界面结构并抵抗高频噪声，对科学计算和逆问题领域有重要贡献。

title: Subprincipal Control of Pseudospectral Quasimodes, II
summary: In this paper, we continue the analysis of the effects of semiclassical sub principal controlled quasimodes, approximate solutions to P(h)u(h,b), depending on the subprincipal symbol b, which can give spectral insta bility (pseudospectrum). We consider a pseudodifferential operator, which has double zeros for the principal symbol, p. This means that p = dp = 0 in a small neighborhood. In the first paper in this series, we considered operators with transversal inter sections of bicharacteristics. Now we study operators with tangential in tersections of bicharacteristics, as well as with double characteristics for p. We put the pseudodifferential operator on normal form microlocally, and use a model operator, P(h) to test for quasimodes. We demonstrate two cases where this happens. We shall also continue with more advanced cases, when the operators are factorable to P(h) = P2(h)P1(h,B), thus annihilating the subprincipal control over the quasimodes.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有双特征值的伪微分算子的拟模构造，特别关注双特征线切向相交情形下的谱不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 研究半经典拟模的构造及其对谱稳定性的影响，特别是当主符号具有双零点时（p=dp=0），如何通过次主符号b控制拟模并导致谱不稳定性（伪谱现象）。
AI.techniques: 使用伪微分算子的微局部分析，将算子化为标准形式，构造模型算子P(h)来测试拟模，并分析双特征线切向相交情形下的拟模构造。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在双特征线切向相交情况下，次主符号b可以控制拟模构造并导致谱不稳定性；展示了算子可分解为P(h)=P₂(h)P₁(h,B)的情形，此时次主符号对拟模的控制被消除。
AI.significance: 深化了对伪微分算子谱不稳定性的理解，特别是双特征值情形下的拟模构造理论，为研究更复杂的谱现象提供了分析框架。

title: On the well-posedness of the initial value problem for the MMT model
summary: This work investigates the initial value problem (IVP) for the two-parameter family of dispersive wave equations known as the Majda-McLaughlin-Tabak (MMT) model, which arises in the weak turbulence theory of random waves. The MMT model can be viewed as a derivative nonlinear Schrödinger (dNLS) equation where both the nonlinearity and dispersion involve nonlocal fractional derivatives. The purpose of this study is twofold: first, to establish a sharp well-posedness theory for the MMT model; and second, to identify the critical threshold for the derivative in the nonlinearity relative to the dispersive order required to ensure well-posedness. As a by- product, we establish sharp well-posedness for non-local fractional dNLS equations; notably, our results resolve the regularity endpoint left open in https://www.aimsciences.org/article/doi/10.3934/dcdsb.2022039 .

AI.tldr: 建立了Majda-McLaughlin-Tabak(MMT)模型和非局部分数阶dNLS方程的尖锐适定性理论，确定了非线性项中导数阶数相对于色散阶的临界阈值。
AI.motivation: 研究源于弱湍流理论中随机波的MMT模型，这是一个双参数色散波方程族，可视为非线性项和色散项都涉及非局部分数阶导数的dNLS方程，旨在建立其适定性理论并确定非线性导数阶数的临界阈值。
AI.techniques: 使用非局部分数阶导数理论、色散波方程分析、适定性理论、临界阈值分析，以及针对端点正则性问题的特殊处理技术。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了MMT模型的尖锐适定性理论，确定了非线性项中导数阶数相对于色散阶的临界阈值，同时解决了非局部分数阶dNLS方程在端点正则性处遗留的开放问题。
AI.significance: 为弱湍流理论中的MMT模型提供了严格的数学基础，解决了该领域长期关注的适定性问题，对色散波方程和非局部dNLS方程的理论发展有重要贡献，特别填补了先前文献中的正则性端点空白。
